prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-24ITESSRCS-3PC-24-BLCK Product Type: SHOVEL_SPADE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Collapsible 24-inch Tri-Folding E-Tool Entrenching Shovel (2 Styles) Description: ASR Outdoor is proud to present our 24-INCH Collapsible Folding Shovel. This is a must-have for every outdoor enthusiast and your emergency preparedness and survival kits. Our shovel folds down to a compact size with a carrying case so that you can easily take it, pack, and carry it in your gear or emergency preparedness and survival kit. It includes a shovel, pick, and saw.

Search Terms: compact folding shovel pick axe backpacking gold prospecting equipment hobbyist trench shovel bug out bag prepper emergency preparedness backpacking field gear Features: - LIGHTWEIGHT OUTDOOR GEAR: Extremely versatile 2pc collapsible hand shovel; Serrated shovel blade with reverse end pick to help break up hard ground while backpacking, at a camping site, or gold claim; - COMPACT AND PORTABLE: Can be folded down and stored in the nylon sheath, easy to carry; when space is a concern this tool can always make room - BACKPACK PROSPECTING EQUIPMENT TOOL: A staple of any backpacking sluice box kit; this small hand shovel is excellent for classifying raw materials, feeding a mini sluice box or river sluice in the field; the hollow handle allows you room to store your gold collection vials safely when working in a stream - HIKING SURVIVAL TOOL: Outdoor camping and survival gear that you can rely on; made from alloy steel with black powder coating to help ensure weather resistant durability; Overall Weight: 2.40lbs - COMFORTABLE HANDLE GRIP: Provides a highly desirable comfortable grip that helps ensure a firm grip that assists in moving raw material away from your digging or trenching area === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
